SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service

Interface IssueReportService

All Known Implementing Classes:
IssueReportServiceImpl
public interface IssueReportService
Service providing operations for creating, retrieving, updating, and administering IssueReport entities.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IssueReport
    createReport(IssueReportRequest request)
    Creates a new report for the currently authenticated user.
    void
    deleteReport(UUID externalId)
    Deletes a report by external identifier.
    Page<IssueReport>
    getAll(Pageable pageable)
    Returns a page of reports for administrative views.
    IssueReport
    getReportByExternalId(UUID externalId)
    Returns a report by external identifier.
    Page<IssueReport>
    getReportsForCurrentUser(Pageable pageable)
    Returns summaries of reports owned by the currently authenticated user.
    IssueReport
    replaceIssueTypes(UUID externalId, Iterable<String> issueTypeTags)
    Replaces the issue types associated with a report.
    IssueReport
    setAcceptedState(UUID externalId, String statusTag)
    Sets the accepted-state/status of a report.
    IssueReport
    updateReport(UUID externalId, IssueReportRequest request)
    Updates an existing report by external identifier.

  • Method Details

    • getReportsForCurrentUser

      Page<IssueReport> getReportsForCurrentUser(Pageable pageable)
      Returns summaries of reports owned by the currently authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      pageable - page number, size, and sort, defined by caller.
      Returns:
      page of report summaries.

    • createReport

      IssueReport createReport(IssueReportRequest request)
      Creates a new report for the currently authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      request - request payload describing the report.
      Returns:
      created report.

    • getReportByExternalId

      IssueReport getReportByExternalId(UUID externalId)
      Returns a report by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - report external ID.
      Returns:
      report entity.

    • updateReport

      IssueReport updateReport(UUID externalId, IssueReportRequest request)
      Updates an existing report by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - report external ID.
      request - request payload describing updates to apply.
      Returns:
      updated report.

    • deleteReport

      void deleteReport(UUID externalId)
      Deletes a report by external identifier.
      Parameters:
      externalId - report external ID.

    • getAll

      Page<IssueReport> getAll(Pageable pageable)
      Returns a page of reports for administrative views.
      Parameters:
      pageable - paging and sorting information.
      Returns:
      page of reports.

    • replaceIssueTypes

      IssueReport replaceIssueTypes(UUID externalId, Iterable<String> issueTypeTags)
      Replaces the issue types associated with a report.
      Parameters:
      externalId - report external ID.
      issueTypeTags - replacement issue type tags.
      Returns:
      updated report.

    • setAcceptedState

      IssueReport setAcceptedState(UUID externalId, String statusTag)
      Sets the accepted-state/status of a report.
      Parameters:
      externalId - report external ID.
      statusTag - accepted-state status tag.
      Returns:
      updated report.
